meta.title: Lessons Learned From A Major ICS Detection Deployment
meta.description:
This was ProtectWise's Sponsor Session at S4x18, and they provide a close look at a large deployment of their protect to detect cyber incidents and anomalies. The presentation goes into detail on the asset owner goals, the pilot, rolling it out to a larger set of sites, and the key learnings for asset owners from this project.

They break down some specific examples and then show some screen shots of their product at 38:00.
